title: ArrowCollect
description: A lightweight Minecraft mod that overhauls arrow retrieval mechanics, ensuring no more lost arrows.
body:
### Arrow Collector Mod  

**Overview**  
A lightweight Minecraft mod that Change arrow retrieval mechanics, ensuring no more lost arrows.  

**Key Features**  
- 100% retrievable arrows from regular bows  
- Automatically flags arrows as "pickup-enabled"  
- Preserves vanilla Infinity enchantment behavior  
- Minimalist design with zero performance impact  

**Why You Need It**  
Vanilla Minecraft often makes normal arrows disappear after firing. This mod fixes that completely - every shot becomes retrievable, saving resources and perfect for survival mode gameplay.  

Simple installation, instant effect. Make every arrow count!
